content:
LexVindhya observed what appeared to be a troubling sequence of events. Public statements by Kapil Sibal and Dushyant Dave criticizing the judiciary were followed by abusive remarks directed at the Chief Justice. Soon thereafter, protests began, and, now, the "glass gavel" became visible for everyone to see.

 Is there credible evidence ?? suggesting a coordinated attempt to undermine constitutional institutions, an impartial investigation by the appropriate authorities, including the NIA if it has jurisdiction under the law, would be necessary to establish the facts, identify those responsible, and determine whether any unlawful conspiracy existed. Accountability must rest on evidence and due process, not speculation.
